arg.name: controllers_file
arg.description: YAML file with the controllers configuration. Valid choices are kuka_6dof_controllers.yaml and kuka_7dof_controllers.yaml.

arg.name: initial_positions_file
arg.description: YAML file with the initial positions for mock hardware. Valid choices are initial_positions.yaml and initial_positions_all_zeros.yaml.

arg.name: description_package
arg.description: Description package with robot URDF/xacro files (e.g., kuka_kr5_support, kuka_lbr_iiwa_support).

arg.name: description_macro_file
arg.description: URDF/XACRO description file of the robot (e.g., kr5_arc_macro.xacro, lbr_iiwa_14_r820_macro.xacro).

arg.name: use_eki_communication
arg.description: Use EKI communication to the KUKA Robot Controller (KR-C).

arg.name: eki_robot_ip
arg.description: IP address for the robot controller for EKI communication.

arg.name: eki_robot_port
arg.description: Port for the robot controller for EKI communication.

arg.name: use_rsi_communication
arg.description: Use RSI communication to the KUKA Robot Controller (KR-C).

arg.name: rsi_listen_ip
arg.description: IP address where the robot controller should connect for RSI communication.

arg.name: rsi_listen_port
arg.description: Port where the robot controller should connect for RSI communication.

arg.name: use_mock_hardware
arg.description: Start robot with fake hardware mirroring command to its states.

arg.name: log_level_driver
arg.description: Set the logging level for the driver nodes (e.g., debug, info, warn, error).

arg.name: log_level_all
arg.description: Set the logging level for all started nodes (e.g., debug, info, warn, error).
